message:
Debug Claude Code WASM: found job #8 hangs in event loop

Added js_std_loop_no_poll to QuickJS for WASI-friendly event loop
that runs timers and promise jobs without blocking poll().

Debug output shows:
- Jobs 0-7 execute successfully
- Job #8 hangs during JS_ExecutePendingJob
- This is likely an I/O operation (stdin read?)

The event loop properly runs timers and handles nanosleep for WASI,
but some JS code is blocking on a synchronous operation.
